positive: A minimalistic, stylized illustration of a soaring hummingbird amongst tropical monstera leaves and jungle florals. The style is highly graphic, inspired by Art Nouveau and modern folk art, using thick, clean linework and bold, jewel-toned colors (emerald green, sapphire blue, deep magenta, and gold accents). The composition should feature the hummingbird as the central, dynamic element, framed by symmetrical, curling foliage. The color palette should have a clear, high-contrast silhouette effect suitable for screen printing on fabric. Studio shot, vector art quality, high detail, elegant composition, deep shadows, vibrant illumination.
negative: blurry, lowres, artifact, text, watermark, logo, signature, messy, watercolor, photograph, poor anatomy, extra limbs, grain, noise, bad composition
